text:
Market today: Tech is still the main driver, with AI buzz fueling big moves like SK Hynix. Your concentrated tech/chip book is right in the thick of it, amplified by margin.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM candidate (-24.46%) given its leveraged nature and current status. SPAL is also a concern (-27.71%), another leveraged ETF that needs watching.

Watch: NVDA shows a strong scanner setup (WATCH 10/12) with a clear entry and stop, and AVGO has a decent setup (WATCH 8/12) as well.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged ETFs and watching key chip names.
plays: Trim SOXL: It's marked SELL and is down significantly. Consider reducing exposure.
Watch SPAL: Down hard (-27.71%) and leveraged. Monitor closely, especially if it breaks down further.
Consider NVDA: Scanner shows a WATCH setup (entry 210.11-209.86, stop 209.21). High score and clear levels.
